title: A startup claims it broke through a bottleneck that’s holding back LLMs
summary: Miami-based AI startup Subquadratic came out of stealth mode last month with a huge claim. It announced that it had solved a mathematical bottleneck that had been holding back large language models for almost a decade. The details were thin, and many people were unconvinced. But Subquadratic has started to bring the receipts, sharing the…
title_es: Subquadratic afirma haber resuelto cuello de botella en LLMs
bajada: La startup Subquadratic salió del sigilo afirmando haber resuelto un cuello de botella matemático que limitaba a los LLMs durante casi una década. Si se confirma, el breakthrough podría mejorar significativamente la eficiencia de modelos de lenguaje.
bajada_en: Startup Subquadratic came out of stealth claiming to have solved a mathematical bottleneck constraining LLMs for nearly a decade. If confirmed, the breakthrough could significantly improve language model efficiency.

title: DeepSeek-V4: Towards Highly Efficient Million-Token Context Intelligence
summary:
arXiv:2606.19348v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: We present a preview version of DeepSeek-V4 series, including two strong Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language models -- DeepSeek-V4-Pro with 1.6T parameters (49B activated) and DeepSeek-V4-Flash with 284B parameters (13B activated) -- both supporting a context length of one million tokens. DeepSeek-V4 series incorporate several key upgrades in architecture and optimization: (1) a hybrid attention architecture that combines Compressed Sparse Attention (CSA) and Heavily Compressed Attention (HCA) to improve long-context efficiency; (2) Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC) that enhance conventional residual connections; (3) and the Muon optimizer for faster convergence and greater training stability. We pre-train both models on more than 32T diverse and high-quality tokens, followed by a comprehensive post-training pipeline that unlocks and further enhances their capabilities. DeepSeek-V4-Pro-Max, the maximum reasoning effort mode of DeepSeek-V4-Pro, redefines the state-of-the-art for open models, outperforming its predecessors in core tasks. Meanwhile, DeepSeek-V4 series are highly efficient in long-context scenarios. In the one-million-token context setting, DeepSeek-V4-Pro requires only 27% of single-token inference FLOPs and 10% of KV cache compared with DeepSeek-V3.2. This enables us to routinely support one-million-token contexts, thereby making long-horizon tasks and further test-time scaling more feasible. The model checkpoints are available at https://huggingface.co/collections/deepseek-ai/deepseek-v4.
title_es: DeepSeek-V4: modelos MoE de 1 millón de tokens de contexto
bajada: DeepSeek lanzó V4-Pro y V4-Flash, modelos MoE que soportan contexto de 1 millón de tokens con arquitectura híbrida de atención. Ambos modelos mejoran eficiencia en escenarios de contexto largo con optimizaciones novedosas.
bajada_en: DeepSeek released V4-Pro and V4-Flash, MoE models supporting 1 million token context with hybrid attention architecture. Both models improve efficiency in long-context scenarios with novel optimizations.

title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
summary: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.
title_es: Modelos de IA de OpenAI ayudan a diagnosticar enfermedades raras
bajada: Investigadores utilizaron un modelo de razonamiento de OpenAI para diagnosticar enfermedades genéticas raras en niños, identificando 18 nuevos diagnósticos en casos previamente sin resolver. Este caso de uso demuestra el impacto real de IA avanzada en medicina.
bajada_en: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to diagnose rare genetic diseases in children, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases. This real-world use case demonstrates the tangible impact of advanced AI in medicine.

title: Source: Elastic agrees to buy CRV-backed DeductiveAI for up to $85M
summary: DeductiveAI, a startup that uses AI to catch and resolve bugs in software, was founded just three years ago.
title_es: Elastic adquiere DeductiveAI por hasta $85 millones
bajada: Elastic acordó comprar DeductiveAI, startup que usa IA para detectar y resolver bugs en software, por hasta $85 millones. La adquisición refleja el crecimiento de herramientas de IA para developer experience y calidad de código.
bajada_en: Elastic agreed to acquire DeductiveAI, a startup using AI to catch and resolve software bugs, for up to $85 million. The acquisition reflects the growing market for AI-powered developer experience and code quality tools.

title: AI inference startup Baseten reportedly raising $1.5B months after its last mega-round
summary: Startup Baseten is reportedly close to finalizing a $1.5 billion round at a $13 billion as the “inference gold rush" marches on.
title_es: Baseten recauda $1.5B en nueva ronda de financiamiento
bajada: La startup de inferencia de IA Baseten está cerca de cerrar una ronda de $1.5 mil millones a una valuación de $13 mil millones. La ronda refleja la competencia feroz por posicionarse en el boom de infraestructura de inferencia.
bajada_en: AI inference startup Baseten is close to finalizing a $1.5 billion funding round at a $13 billion valuation. The round reflects fierce competition to position itself in the inference infrastructure boom.

title: Photoshop and Premiere now have AI assistants
summary: Adobe's plan to stick AI assistants into all of its Creative Cloud suite is now fully underway, with new chatbots now rolling out to its biggest editing and design apps. As part of a public beta launching today, Photoshop, Premiere, Illustrator, InDesign, and Frame.io now each have a bespoke AI Assistant that can be used […]
title_es: Adobe integra asistentes de IA en Photoshop y Premiere
bajada: Adobe lanzó asistentes de IA personalizados en beta pública para Photoshop, Premiere, Illustrator, InDesign y Frame.io. La iniciativa es parte del plan de Adobe de integrar IA en toda su suite Creative Cloud.
bajada_en: Adobe launched custom AI assistants in public beta for Photoshop, Premiere, Illustrator, InDesign, and Frame.io. The initiative is part of Adobe's broader plan to integrate AI across its entire Creative Cloud suite.

title: The White House Is Making Up Its Rules for AI in Real Time
summary: Anthropic still can’t distribute Claude Mythos or Fable 5 after running afoul of the Trump administration. But no one can say exactly what the company did wrong.
title_es: Casa Blanca crea reglas de IA sobre la marcha
bajada: Anthropic enfrenta restricciones para distribuir Claude Mythos y Fable 5 tras conflictos con la administración Trump, pero no hay claridad sobre qué regulaciones específicas infringió. La situación evidencia la falta de marcos claros en regulación de IA.
bajada_en: Anthropic faces restrictions distributing Claude Mythos and Fable 5 after running afoul of the Trump administration, but the specific regulations violated remain unclear. The situation highlights the lack of clear frameworks in AI regulation.

title: Billionaire Ambani wants AI in every call, app, and home
summary: Reliance is weaving AI into telecom services used by more than 500 million people.
title_es: Reliance integrará IA en servicios para 500M usuarios
bajada: El billonario Ambani planea integrar IA en llamadas, apps y servicios del hogar de Reliance, que tienen más de 500 millones de usuarios. Esta es una de las mayores iniciativas globales de IA en telecom.
bajada_en: Billionaire Ambani plans to integrate AI into Reliance's calls, apps, and home services serving over 500 million users. This is one of the largest global AI initiatives in telecommunications.

title: Before SpaceX IPO, investors in China secretly acquired stakes
summary: One previously unreported SpaceX investor has ties to Chinese military contractors.
title_es: Before SpaceX IPO, investors in China secretly acquired stakes
bajada: One previously unreported SpaceX investor has ties to Chinese military contractors.

title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
summary: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.
title_es: OpenAI lanza controles de gasto para ChatGPT Enterprise
bajada: OpenAI introdujo nuevas herramientas de análisis de uso y controles de gasto para ChatGPT Enterprise, permitiendo a las organizaciones gestionar costos de IA de forma más eficiente. Esta actualización facilita que empresas escalen su adopción de IA con mayor control financiero.
bajada_en: OpenAI introduced new usage analytics and spend controls for ChatGPT Enterprise, allowing organizations to manage AI costs more efficiently. This update makes it easier for companies to scale AI adoption with better financial oversight.

title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
summary: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.
title_es: GPT-5.5 Instant mejora respuestas de salud en ChatGPT
bajada: OpenAI mejoró las capacidades de ChatGPT en temas de salud y bienestar usando GPT-5.5 Instant, con mejor razonamiento y evaluaciones informadas por médicos. Los cambios hacen que el modelo comprenda mejor contextos médicos y comunique información de forma más clara.
bajada_en: OpenAI improved ChatGPT's health and wellness capabilities using GPT-5.5 Instant, with better reasoning and physician-informed evaluations. The changes help the model better understand medical contexts and communicate information more clearly.

title: Barret Zoph is out at OpenAI again after just five months
summary: Five months after returning to OpenAI, Barret Zoph - the company's head of enterprise AI sales - has departed, The Verge has learned. Zoph returned to OpenAI in mid-January after a stint as co-founder and CTO of Thinking Machines Lab, the competing AI company founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati. Shortly after Zoph returned […]
title_es: Barret Zoph se va de OpenAI tras solo cinco meses
bajada: Barret Zoph, head de ventas enterprise de OpenAI, abandonó la empresa después de solo cinco meses de su regreso. Zoph había vuelto en enero después de fundar Thinking Machines Lab con Mira Murati.
bajada_en: Barret Zoph, OpenAI's head of enterprise AI sales, departed the company after just five months following his return. Zoph had rejoined in January after co-founding Thinking Machines Lab with Mira Murati.

title: MosaicLeaks: Can your research agent keep a secret?
title_es: MosaicLeaks: riesgos de privacidad en research agents
bajada: ServiceNow publicó MosaicLeaks, investigación sobre vulnerabilidades de privacidad en research agents con IA. El estudio alerta sobre riesgos de que estos agentes revelen información sensible.
bajada_en: ServiceNow published MosaicLeaks, research on privacy vulnerabilities in AI-powered research agents. The study alerts to risks of these agents leaking sensitive information.

title: How FERC’s Large-Load Interconnection Actions Help Address Grid Stress, Improve Affordability
summary: In a consequential grid infrastructure decision, the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC) today issued a major milestone on large-load interconnection impacting how those building AI factories, semiconductor fabrication support systems and advanced manufacturing facilities can connect to the grid.  In the era of AI, which NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang has described as a […]
title_es: FERC facilita conexión a la red para data centers de IA
bajada: La Comisión Federal Reguladora de Energía (FERC) emitió una decisión clave sobre interconexión de grandes cargas, facilitando que data centers y fábricas de IA se conecten a la red. La medida aborda presiones de infraestructura energética causadas por la IA.
bajada_en: The Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC) issued a key decision on large-load interconnection, making it easier for AI data centers and semiconductor facilities to connect to the grid. The measure addresses infrastructure pressure caused by AI.

title: Is the US government’s Anthropic ban accidentally helping the brand?
summary: Just as last week was ending, the US government forced Anthropic to pull its two newest models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, citing national security concerns after Amazon researchers allegedly found a way to bypass Fable 5’s guardrails.  Cybersecurity researchers have since signed an open letter calling the move dangerous, and Anthropic itself noted the same jailbreaks exist in other models. So is […]
title_es: Gobierno de EE.UU. prohíbe modelos Fable 5 y Mythos 5 de Anthropic
bajada: El gobierno estadounidense obligó a Anthropic a retirar sus dos últimos modelos por preocupaciones de seguridad nacional, tras descobrirse vulnerabilidades en Fable 5. Investigadores de ciberseguridad critican la decisión, argumentando que fallas similares existen en otros modelos.
bajada_en: The US government forced Anthropic to pull its two latest models over national security concerns after vulnerabilities were discovered in Fable 5. Cybersecurity researchers criticize the decision, arguing similar flaws exist in competing models.

title: Encryption, spyware, and now Mythos: History shows why cyber export control doesn’t work
summary: For the last 30 years, stopping the flow of cybersecurity-related software has proven to be ineffective. It's unclear why it would work now with Anthropic’s cybersecurity model Mythos.
title_es: Control de exportaciones de IA: ¿Por qué no funciona?
bajada: Un análisis de TechCrunch examina cómo 30 años de restricciones a software de ciberseguridad han fracasado históricamente. Con el modelo Mythos de Anthropic bajo fuego, expertos cuestionan si esta estrategia de control es viable en la era de la IA.
bajada_en: A TechCrunch analysis examines how 30 years of restrictions on cybersecurity software have historically failed. With Anthropic's Mythos model under fire, experts question whether this control strategy is viable in the AI era.

title: The US banned Anthropic’s Fable 5 release, but the numbers don’t seem to care
summary: Just as last week was ending, the US government forced Anthropic to pull its two newest models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, citing national security concerns after Amazon researchers allegedly found a way to bypass Fable 5’s guardrails.  Cybersecurity researchers have since signed an open letter calling the move dangerous, and Anthropic itself noted the same jailbreaks exist in other models. So is […]
title_es: La prohibición de Anthropic no afecta el mercado, según métricas
bajada: A pesar de la prohibición gubernamental de Fable 5 y Mythos 5, los datos de mercado sugieren que la restricción tiene poco impacto real en la tracción de Anthropic. El episodio plantea preguntas sobre la efectividad de los controles de exportación.
bajada_en: Despite the government ban on Fable 5 and Mythos 5, market metrics suggest the restriction has minimal real impact on Anthropic's traction. The episode raises questions about the effectiveness of export controls.
